name: mcp-guardian
description: Security, cost, and health governance proxy for MCP infrastructure — three-layer detection engine (regex + schema + LLM), monorepo, CI/CD, mTLS, zero-trust

NVD_API_KEY.description: NIST NVD API key for CVE lookups (optional)

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for semantic LLM analysis layer

releases.notes: Production hardening — better-sqlite3, HTTP proxy, transitive CVE, secrets, watchdog, CSP, scoring, retention
